physics-op-amp-inverting: Draw an inverting op-amp circuit with input resistor Rin, feedback resistor Rf, non-inverting input grounded, input voltage Vin, output Vout, and op-amp triangle. Labels must not overlap wires.
physics-telescope-ray-diagram: Draw an astronomical telescope ray diagram with objective lens, eyepiece lens, parallel incoming rays, intermediate image, final parallel rays, and focal length labels.
physics-equipotential-dipole: Draw equipotential curves around an electric dipole with +q and -q, several closed/dashed curves, electric field direction arrows, and labels away from curves.
physics-capacitor-dielectric: Draw a parallel plate capacitor with dielectric slab inserted halfway, plate charges +Q and -Q, field arrows, plate separation d, and dielectric constant k label.
physics-heat-engine-flow: Draw a heat engine block diagram with hot reservoir TH, engine, cold reservoir TC, heat input QH, work output W, rejected heat QC, and arrows with no overlap.
physics-standing-wave-pipe: Draw standing wave modes in an open-closed pipe for the first and third harmonics, showing node/antinode labels and pipe endpoints clearly.
chem-phase-diagram-co2: Draw a CO2 phase diagram with pressure-temperature axes, sublimation/fusion/vaporization curves, triple point, critical point, and labeled solid/liquid/gas regions.
chem-nitration-benzene: Draw a simple nitration of benzene reaction scheme: benzene plus NO2+ gives nitrobenzene. Show aromatic ring and NO2 substituent clearly.
chem-organic-curved-arrow: Draw a simple organic curved-arrow mechanism step with hydroxide attacking a carbonyl carbon, pi bond moving to oxygen, and labels nucleophile/electrophile.
chem-michaelis-menten: Draw a Michaelis-Menten enzyme kinetics graph with v versus substrate concentration S, Vmax asymptote, Km marked at Vmax/2, and labels outside curves.
chem-amino-acid-zwitterion: Draw a generic amino acid zwitterion with NH3+, COO-, R group, H, central carbon, and charges readable.
chem-crystal-field-octahedral: Draw octahedral crystal field splitting diagram with lower t2g set, upper eg set, delta_o gap, and electron arrows separated.
math-3d-paraboloid-contours: Draw a 3D-looking paraboloid z=x^2+y^2 with axes and a small adjacent contour map of concentric circles. Keep labels outside shapes.
math-vector-projection: Draw vectors a and b from the origin, the projection of a onto b as a dashed foot, right angle mark, and labels proj_b a and a-proj component.
math-normal-curve-zscore: Draw a normal distribution with mean mu, z-score region shaded to the right of z, vertical lines at mu and z, and labels not overlapping.
math-boxplot-outliers: Draw a horizontal box plot with whiskers, median, Q1, Q3, two outlier points, and number line ticks below.
